property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\jhars\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0HRKRtk;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Users\jhars\Downloads\jdk-21_windows-x64_bin.zip\jdk-21.0.9\bin;D:\Tomcat\lib\servlet-api.jar;D:\app\oracle\product\11.2.0\server\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\Nodejs\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2023.2.5\bin;;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1\bin;C:\Users\jhars\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;c:\Users\jhars\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-26.513.21555-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: getOwners_shouldReturn403_whenRoleIsNotAdmin
testcase.system-out:
